name: IdsEdwAplLvlNoteLnDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT NOTE.APL_LVL_NOTE_LN_SK, CASE WHEN COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'') = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') END AS SRC_SYS_CD, NOTE.APL_ID, NOTE.LVL_SEQ_NO AS APL_LVL_SEQ_NO, NOTE.NOTE_SEQ_NO AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SEQ_NO, NOTE.NOTE_DEST_ID AS APL_LVL_NOTE_DEST_ID, NOTE.LN_SEQ_NO AS APL_LVL_NOTE_LN_SEQ_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, NOTE.APL_LVL_NOTE_SK, COALESCE(NOTE.LN_TX, '   ') AS APL_LVL_NOTE_LN_TX, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.APL_LVL_NOTE_LN NOTE LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON NOTE.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE NOTE.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND NOTE.APL_LVL_NOTE_LN_SK NOT IN (0,1)), cte_na AS (SELECT 1 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_LN_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'NA' AS APL_ID, 0 AS APL_LVL_SEQ_NO, 0 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SEQ_NO, 'NA' AS APL_LVL_NOTE_DEST_ID, 0 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_LN_SEQ_NO, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SK, '' AS APL_LVL_NOTE_LN_TX, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), cte_unk AS (SELECT 0 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_LN_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'UNK' AS APL_ID, 0 AS APL_LVL_SEQ_NO, 0 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SEQ_NO, 'UNK' AS APL_LVL_NOTE_DEST_ID, 0 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_LN_SEQ_NO, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS APL_LVL_NOTE_SK, '' AS APL_LVL_NOTE_LN_TX, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM cte_na UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_main
